meaning: n.地出(从月球上看地球,地球从月球的地平线上升起)
examples: Witnessing an earthrise made them feel humble.
Shi Yan is excited about the food raised at Earthrise and feels it tastes better than commercially grown food.
The Apollo 16 crew captured this Earthrise with a handheld Hasselblad camera during the second revolution of the moon.
The "Earthrise" photo showed Americans the beauty of Earth from a new perspective.
